origins.name: Acolyte
origins.flavor: You served in a temple or shrine, traveled the world in search of answers, tending to sacred duties and learning the deeper mysteries of faith.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Incense and burner, 5 candles, Sanctified water (3 vials)
**Kits:** Healer's kit
**Clothing:** Ceremonial vestments
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Holy symbol, Prayer book, Religious texts (2), Donation box

consumables.raw: Incense and burner, 5 candles, Sanctified water (3 vials)

misc.raw: Holy symbol, Prayer book, Religious texts (2), Donation box

vocations.name: Pilgrim
vocations.flavor: You've traveled long and hard in search of answers to life, to death, to immortality, or to whatever answer it is you seek to find. Long have you traveled this path, and continue on you shall.

features.name: Religious Insight
features.description_markdown: You have traveled enough roads and plains to see religions in all forms. You have **Resolve** on skill checks related to **religious knowledge or insight.**
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You have traveled enough roads and plains to see religions in all forms. You have **Resolve** on skill checks related to **religious knowledge or insight.**

vocations.name: Shaman
vocations.flavor: You're connection to the weave of fate, deities, nature, or even the deathless have led you to become in tune with the fabrics of reality. Will you seek to continue your journey of duties you hold sacred, or will you give into your own ambition?

features.name: Ritual Practice
features.description_markdown: Rituals and ceremony are second nature to you. Regardless of your spell casting abilities, you learn one tier 1 **ritual** spell of your choice and can use it once per day. If you do not already have a **Spellcasting** feat, you gain access to **limited spell casting** using **Primeval**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive  
Rituals and ceremony are second nature to you. Regardless of your spell casting abilities, you learn one tier 1 **ritual** spell of your choice and can use it once per day. If you do not already have a **Spellcasting** feat, you gain access to **limited spell casting** using **Primeval**.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description_markdown:
You have learned to channel sacred rites into direct magic. Gain access to actions and spells that require spell casting. Your spellcasting features are as follows:
- You are a **Limited-caster**.
- Your **source** is **Primeval**.
- Your **Spellcasting Modifier** is **Mind**.
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1.
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).
- You gain two **Cantrips** from the **Primeval** source.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** -
You have learned to channel sacred rites into direct magic. Gain access to actions and spells that require spell casting. Your spellcasting features are as follows:
- You are a **Limited-caster**.
- Your **source** is **Primeval**.
- Your **Spellcasting Modifier** is **Mind**.
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1.
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).
- You gain two **Cantrips** from the **Primeval** source.

###### Cantrips

**Primeval Lure**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
You lash out with a ethereal line, pulling a target closer to you. Make a **spell attack roll** against the **body** of the target. On hit, deal 1d6 **elemental** damage of choice, on a **critical hit** move the target one range closer towards you.

**Primeval Rebuke**
**Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Minute
You place an **aura** around a willing target which creates a energy of primeval energy. When the target with this **aura** is hit, it releases the energy in a **elemental** damage type of choice, dealing 2d4 of that damage type.

**Primeval Ward** 
**Range** Touch | **Duration** 1 Round
You touch an ally or yourself, and until the end of your next turn, that target gains **resistance** to a **elemental** damage type of your choice equal to your **spell casting modifier**.

**Unseen Messenger** 
**Range** Far | **Duration** Instant
You can send a message to known target within range that is 5 seconds in length. The messenger is ethereal and cannot be physically seen or stopped by non-magical means.

spellcasting.known_spells: Start with Two Known Spells at Tier 1.
spellcasting.respite_recovery: Each Respite restores spell points equal to your Spellcasting Modifier (minimum 3).
cantrip_notes: You gain two Cantrips from the Primeval source.

granted_cantrips.description_markdown: You lash out with a ethereal line, pulling a target closer to you. Make a **spell attack roll** against the **body** of the target. On hit, deal 1d6 **elemental** damage of choice, on a **critical hit** move the target one range closer towards you.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:

**Primeval Rebuke**
**Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Minute

granted_cantrips.description_markdown: You can send a message to known target within range that is 5 seconds in length. The messenger is ethereal and cannot be physically seen or stopped by non-magical means.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Unseen Messenger**
**Range** Far | **Duration** Instant
You can send a message to known target within range that is 5 seconds in length. The messenger is ethereal and cannot be physically seen or stopped by non-magical means.

vocations.name: Zealot
vocations.flavor: The path before you is clear, and the only way forward for all is to convert people to your ideology. For to long you have seen the world fall apart, but now you know you have the answers to fix it.

features.name: Vow of Protection
features.description_markdown: Your path is true and righteous, your will allows you to protect yourself or your allies. Once per day, regardless of spell casting abilities, you can cast *[[Chapter 4.5 - Spell List (Old)#Shield of Faith|shield of faith]]* at tier 1.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Your path is true and righteous, your will allows you to protect yourself or your allies. Once per day, regardless of spell casting abilities, you can cast *[[Chapter 4.5 - Spell List (Old)#Shield of Faith|shield of faith]]* at tier 1.

origins.name: Apprentice
origins.flavor: You learned your trade under a master craftsperson, developing both practical skills and an eye for quality workmanship.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Material samples worth 20 gold
**Kits:** Craftsman's tools (relevant to chosen craft), Repair kit, Sizing tools
**Clothing:** None
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Masterwork sample, Design sketches, Apprentice certificate, Merchant contacts list, Unfinished project

kits.raw: Craftsman's tools (relevant to chosen craft), Repair kit, Sizing tools

misc.raw: Masterwork sample, Design sketches, Apprentice certificate, Merchant contacts list, Unfinished project

vocations.name: Artisan
vocations.flavor: You enjoy the finer crafts of life. Nothing brings you as much joy as seeing a beautifully made piece of work done by skilled hands and mind. You have come to the end of your apprenticeship, and now must find a way to carve your own work into history.

features.name: Valuable Intuition
features.description_markdown: You're master taught you how to recognize a scam or trap from a mile away, and when something is authentic. You have **Resolve** on skill checks when identifying the origins or magical effects of an item.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You're master taught you how to recognize a scam or trap from a mile away, and when something is authentic. You have **Resolve** on skill checks when identifying the origins or magical effects of an item.

vocations.name: Builder
vocations.flavor: The walls of the city weren't built in one day, the grand wonders of the world were not made by one man, but the were for sure built by people like you. The work you've done has given you strength above the common folk, and while you may have enjoyed your apprenticeship, it's time to build your own legacy.

features.name: Improvised Protection
features.description_markdown: You have built enough walls in your time to know how to manipulate the environment to protect your self for a moment. If large enough or loose items are available, you can use the environment to gain a +2 to **Armor**, for the next attack.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Maneuver | **Cost** 1 AP 
You have built enough walls in your time to know how to manipulate the environment to protect your self for a moment. If large enough or loose items are available, you can use the environment to gain a +2 to **Armor**, for the next attack.

vocations.name: Designer
vocations.flavor: Skill and strength are all fine and well, but unless someone has a clear vision or experience to guide their hands, what more can they do? You spent your early years training and learning from your master the eye of discernment, now it's time to go show others all of what you can do for them.

features.name: Makeshift Intuition
features.description_markdown: You know how most things work, and can pretty well come up with a clever tool on the spot. When attempting craft an item of **Minimal** quality, you have **Resolve** on those **Skill Checks**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You know how most things work, and can pretty well come up with a clever tool on the spot. When attempting craft an item of **Minimal** quality, you have **Resolve** on those **Skill Checks**.

origins.name: Boroughborn
origins.flavor: You were raised among stone and spectacle, where voices echo through narrow streets and power shifts between coin, law, and influence. The city shaped you — teaching you when to speak, when to stand firm, and when to bend the rules in your favor.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** None  
**Kits:** Writing Implements or Street Performer’s Tools, Local Map  
**Clothing:** Well-worn urban attire  
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Familiar route tokens, Rumor ledger, Guild insignia, City pass writ, Hidden safehouse key

kits.raw: Writing Implements or Street Performer’s Tools, Local Map
items: Writing Implements or Street Performer’s Tools

misc.raw: Familiar route tokens, Rumor ledger, Guild insignia, City pass writ, Hidden safehouse key

vocations.name: Entertainer
vocations.flavor: The crowd is your stage and attention is your currency. You’ve learned how to command eyes, stir emotion, and shape the mood of any gathering through presence alone.

features.name: Captivating Presence
features.description_markdown: When you perform or engage an audience through **Performance** or **Persuasion**, you gain **Resolve** on the check. On a **critical success**, you gain additional +1 Skill Checks related to **Social** on affected targets until the next day.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive  
When you perform or engage an audience through **Performance** or **Persuasion**, you gain **Resolve** on the check. On a **critical success**, you gain additional +1 Skill Checks related to **Social** on affected targets until the next day.

vocations.name: Informant
vocations.flavor: The city speaks to those who know how to listen. You learned where secrets travel, how rumors grow, and which words open locked doors. Every whisper is a thread, and you know how to follow them to the source.

features.name: Drudge Out
features.description_markdown: You are always ambitious about gathering information. When used, you gain Resolve on **Skill Checks** related to **Lore**, **Social** or **Intuition**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** 1 Ambition 
You are always ambitious about gathering information. When used, you gain Resolve on **Skill Checks** related to **Lore**, **Social** or **Intuition**.

vocations.name: City Watch
vocations.flavor: You are the law given form. Whether driven by duty or necessity, you learned how to assert presence and maintain order through force, discipline, and authority.

features.name: Quick Grab
features.description_markdown: When you are **Engaged** with an enemy who is attempting to **Disengage** or **Dash**, you attempt a **Grapple** action within range of **touch**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** 1 AP  
When you are **Engaged** with an enemy who is attempting to **Disengage** or **Dash**, you attempt a **Grapple** action within range of **touch**.

origins.name: Chosen
origins.flavor: Favor from beyond the stars marks your lineage. Whether born under an omen, shaped by prophecy, or carried by sheer stubborn will, destiny threads through your life in ways few can deny.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** None
**Kits:** Divination tools
**Clothing:** Ceremonial attire
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Celestial trinket, Silver mirror, Dream journal, Star chart, Mysterious glowing crystal, Family prophecy scroll, Unusual birthmark

misc.raw: Celestial trinket, Silver mirror, Dream journal, Star chart, Mysterious glowing crystal, Family prophecy scroll, Unusual birthmark

vocations.name: Starborn
vocations.flavor: The stars aligned at your birth, and the world’s momentum has always seemed to push you forward. You believe the heavens hold purpose for you—if you can only move fast enough to meet it.

features.name: Ancestral Magic
features.description_markdown: If you do not already have a **Spellcasting** feat, you gain **limited spellcasting** using **Anima**. You also learn two Tier 1 **anima** spells that do not count against your known spells, and learn two **Starborn** Cantrips
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
If you do not already have a **Spellcasting** feat, you gain **limited spellcasting** using **Anima**. You also learn two Tier 1 **anima** spells that do not count against your known spells, and learn two **Starborn** Cantrips

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description_markdown:
- You're a **Limited-caster**
- **Source:** _Anima_
- **Spellcasting Modifier:** _Will_
- **Reservoir:** (½ × Tier) + Will (rounded up)
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- **Prepared Spells:** Will
- **Spell DC:** 10 + Spell Tier + Will
- **Respite Recovery:** Regain spell points equal to your **Will** (minimum 3)
- - **Cantrips:** gain two from **Anima** source
features.raw_markdown:
- You're a **Limited-caster**
- **Source:** _Anima_
- **Spellcasting Modifier:** _Will_
- **Reservoir:** (½ × Tier) + Will (rounded up)
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- **Prepared Spells:** Will
- **Spell DC:** 10 + Spell Tier + Will
- **Respite Recovery:** Regain spell points equal to your **Will** (minimum 3)
- - **Cantrips:** gain two from **Anima** source

###### Cantrips

**Mending Bond** 
**Range** Touch | **Duration** Instant
You create a bond using magical energy to reinforce or mend small fractures or tears in objects no larger than 1 ft / 0.3 m. This cannot restore a magical item's effects if it was destroyed.

**Starfall**
**Range** Nearby | **Duration**
You launch loose debris and objects of minimal mass. Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d8 **gravity** plus **spell casting modifier**.

**Starlight** 
**Range** Self | **Duration** 1 hour *(Focused)*
You create a small torch-sized light which emits 20 ft / 6 m of **dim-light** that hovers around you and follows you. It can be moved to any location within your **zone** once per turn, and follows if you change **zones**.

**Radiant Dart**
**Range** Self | **Duration** Instant
You send a bolt of bright energy at a target. Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d4 **ether**, and on a **critical hit** that target is illuminated and cannot be a state of **hidden** or **unaware**.

spellcasting.known_spells: Start with Two Known Spells at Tier 1
spellcasting.respite_recovery: Respite Recovery: Regain spell points equal to your Will (minimum 3)
cantrip_notes: - Cantrips: gain two from Anima source

granted_cantrips.description_markdown: You create a bond using magical energy to reinforce or mend small fractures or tears in objects no larger than 1 ft / 0.3 m. This cannot restore a magical item's effects if it was destroyed.

You send a bolt of bright energy at a target. Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d4 **ether**, and on a **critical hit** that target is illuminated and cannot be a state of **hidden** or **unaware**.

vocations.name: Anointed
vocations.flavor: At your birth, a sign was given—a prophecy spoken, a storm unleashed, or perhaps you simply arrived when the world needed you most. Destiny does not merely push you; it listens when you speak.

features.name: Foresight
features.description_markdown: Once per **respite**, you glimpse a strand of possible futures. Grant **Resolve** to yourself or an ally on their next **attack** or **skill check**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Support | **Cost** 1 AP
Once per **respite**, you glimpse a strand of possible futures. Grant **Resolve** to yourself or an ally on their next **attack** or **skill check**.

vocations.name: Fated
vocations.flavor: You began life as nothing—or so you believe. Yet fate continues to spare you, nudging you toward a future you haven’t yet deciphered. You refuse to fall before you discover why.

features.name: Deny Death
features.description_markdown: Once per **Long Rest**, when you would meet your **Wounds Threshold**, you instead regain **1 Vitality** and remain standing taking no **Wounds**. There is still more for you to do.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger
Once per **Long Rest**, when you would meet your **Wounds Threshold**, you instead regain **1 Vitality** and remain standing taking no **Wounds**. There is still more for you to do.

origins.name: Commonfolk
origins.flavor: Everyone knew who you were, they even knew who your grandmother's childhood sweetheart was. You were raised to be prepared for the world, and the commonalities and vocations of life.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** 1 Week of Rations
**Kits:** Vocation dependent
**Clothing:** Homemade clothing
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Picture Locket, Traditional family heirloom, Rough Regional map, Walking stick, Waterproof bag

misc.raw: Picture Locket, Traditional family heirloom, Rough Regional map, Walking stick, Waterproof bag

vocations.name: Mariner
vocations.flavor: Your town grew up close to the water, and you were a small fishing community that provided fish supplies to some of the larger cities. You have gain a lot of strength from working with aquatic life and also have heard some fascinating stories from the merchants who came to trade.

features.name: Large Catch
features.description_markdown: When taking the **Grapple** action, you may grapple up to a size larger than you.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
When taking the **Grapple** action, you may grapple up to a size larger than you.

vocations.name: Tavernhand
vocations.flavor: You worked at the local stop serving both your friends, rivals, first loves, and passing travelers. You've done a bit of everything there to gain some practical skills, but not enough to where you could run the place by yourself.

features.name: Crowd Step
features.description_markdown:
You’ve learned to move through packed tables, drunk patrons, and tight crowds.  
While **engaged by two or more enemies**, the **Dodge** action costs **1 AP less** (minimum 1).
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** -
You’ve learned to move through packed tables, drunk patrons, and tight crowds.  
While **engaged by two or more enemies**, the **Dodge** action costs **1 AP less** (minimum 1).

vocations.name: Oddjob
vocations.flavor: You were the reliable one—always helping fix a fence, patch a roof, mend a pot, carry a load, or solve a small problem that nobody else had time for. No formally training, but naturally handy and quick to pick things up. You became the person everyone relied on when something needed doing.

features.name: Tool Expertise
features.description_markdown: You are always ready to work and get the job done. Whenever you make a **Check** using a **Tool** you are proficient with, you roll with **Resolve**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You are always ready to work and get the job done. Whenever you make a **Check** using a **Tool** you are proficient with, you roll with **Resolve**.

origins.name: Cursed
origins.flavor: An unfathomable echo flows in your bloodline, marking you with both supernatural gifts and ominous burdens.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Strange herbal remedies, Ritual cleansing materials, Symptom control potions (3)
**Kits:** None
**Clothing:** Concealing clothing/makeup
**Misc.: (Pick 2)** Cursed trinket (cannot be discarded), Journal of curse research, Protective amulet, Warning symbols, Family history scroll

consumables.raw: Strange herbal remedies, Ritual cleansing materials, Symptom control potions (3)

misc.raw: Cursed trinket (cannot be discarded), Journal of curse research, Protective amulet, Warning symbols, Family history scroll

origin_features.name: Spellcasting
origin_features.description_markdown:
- You're a **Limited-caster**
- **Source:** _Soul_
- **Spellcasting Modifier:** _Will_
- **Reservoir:** (½ × Tier) + Will (rounded up)
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- **Prepared Spells:** Will
- **Spell DC:** 10 + Spell Tier + Will
- **Respite Recovery:** Regain spell points equal to your **Will** (minimum 3)
- **Cantrips:** gain two from **Soul** source
origin_features.raw_markdown:
- You're a **Limited-caster**
- **Source:** _Soul_
- **Spellcasting Modifier:** _Will_
- **Reservoir:** (½ × Tier) + Will (rounded up)
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- **Prepared Spells:** Will
- **Spell DC:** 10 + Spell Tier + Will
- **Respite Recovery:** Regain spell points equal to your **Will** (minimum 3)
- **Cantrips:** gain two from **Soul** source

###### Cantrips

**Blight Touch** 
**Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Round
Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **poison** or **void**. On a **critical hit**, reduce the target's **body** by -2 until the end of its next turn. The target is also, considered **hexed** until the end of your next turn. 

**Grim Knowledge** 
**Range** Nearby | **Duration** Instant
You are well acquainted with curses and hexes. You cast magic to detect if a creature within range has either a magic or spell effect from a curse or hex placed upon them.

**Hex Barb**
**Range** Nearby | **Duration** Instant
Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d6 **void** and if the target is **hexed** or is suffering from a **condition**, damage increase to 1d12.

**Shallow Darkness** 
**Range** Touch | **Duration** 1 minute
You cast a **aura** upon a willing target, the next **stealth** check from that target gains a +2.

spellcasting.known_spells: Start with Two Known Spells at Tier 1
spellcasting.respite_recovery: Respite Recovery: Regain spell points equal to your Will (minimum 3)
cantrip_notes: Cantrips: gain two from Soul source

granted_cantrips.description_markdown: Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **poison** or **void**. On a **critical hit**, reduce the target's **body** by -2 until the end of its next turn. The target is also, considered **hexed** until the end of your next turn.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Blight Touch**
**Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Round
Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **poison** or **void**. On a **critical hit**, reduce the target's **body** by -2 until the end of its next turn. The target is also, considered **hexed** until the end of your next turn.

granted_cantrips.name: Grim Knowledge
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: You are well acquainted with curses and hexes. You cast magic to detect if a creature within range has either a magic or spell effect from a curse or hex placed upon them.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Grim Knowledge**
**Range** Nearby | **Duration** Instant
You are well acquainted with curses and hexes. You cast magic to detect if a creature within range has either a magic or spell effect from a curse or hex placed upon them.

granted_cantrips.name: Hex Barb
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d6 **void** and if the target is **hexed** or is suffering from a **condition**, damage increase to 1d12.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Hex Barb**
**Range** Nearby | **Duration** Instant
Make a **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 1d6 **void** and if the target is **hexed** or is suffering from a **condition**, damage increase to 1d12.

granted_cantrips.name: Shallow Darkness
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: You cast a **aura** upon a willing target, the next **stealth** check from that target gains a +2.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Shallow Darkness**
**Range** Touch | **Duration** 1 minute
You cast a **aura** upon a willing target, the next **stealth** check from that target gains a +2.

vocations.name: Exile
vocations.flavor: Left in the cold, no one remembers your name, or at least they have tried to erase it from memory. Your blood runs deep with a curse no history has ever recalled. You have grown tired of this exile, whether you succumb to this curse or remove it, this exile will end.

features.name: Pass the Curse
features.description_markdown: You would rather sell your soul then let death take you. Once per **Respite**, when an attack would **critically** hit you, you turn it into **regular** hit.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger 
You would rather sell your soul then let death take you. Once per **Respite**, when an attack would **critically** hit you, you turn it into **regular** hit.

vocations.name: Host
vocations.flavor: You don't know how someone could be as unlucky as you, maybe it was the family you were born into, perhaps you should have listened and not gone into the woods at night, but now the voices won't stop. They bay you constantly to reach achieve it's goal, and now you've decided to finally do something about it. You need them to stop.

features.name: Whispers of Insanity
features.description_markdown: You can cast spells without a **Spell Catalyst**, and without speaking.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You can cast spells without a **Spell Catalyst**, and without speaking.

vocations.name: Visitor
vocations.flavor: Was it a dream, why can you not get rid of this cursed trinket. You hoped that the Visitor was just a dream, or maybe the pact you signed was not real. Regardless, you know this trinket is the answer to your curse, and something must be done about it.

features.name: Already Claimed
features.description_markdown: Whether you like it or not, you've already been claimed for. You have **Resolve** on saving throws against magical effects that attempt to **control**, **charm**, or **manipulate** you.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Whether you like it or not, you've already been claimed for. You have **Resolve** on saving throws against magical effects that attempt to **control**, **charm**, or **manipulate** you.

origins.name: Farmhand
origins.flavor: You worked the land from an early age, developing both physical strength and practical wisdom. Civilization and people are something you rarely encountered, as you prefer the fresh air and animals.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Seed pouch, Homemade preserved foods, Folk medicine supplies
**Kits:** Animal handling kit
**Clothing:** Sturdy work clothes
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Farming tools, Weather prediction almanac, Harvest festival token, Animal whistle

consumables.raw: Seed pouch, Homemade preserved foods, Folk medicine supplies

misc.raw: Farming tools, Weather prediction almanac, Harvest festival token, Animal whistle

vocations.name: Caretaker
vocations.flavor: You've always enjoyed the company of animals more than people. Let's be honest, have you ever met a horse you didn't like, compared to a person? Though you have realized while your skills at home were useful for a time, maybe you can go out and do some good with your talent.

features.name: Animal Person
features.description_markdown: You have a natural affinity with animals. Gain **Resolve** on **skill checks** and can attempt to communicate basic intentions with domesticated or wild animals even without a common language.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You have a natural affinity with animals. Gain **Resolve** on **skill checks** and can attempt to communicate basic intentions with domesticated or wild animals even without a common language.

vocations.name: Fieldhand
vocations.flavor: The soil has been your companion, your hands calloused from years of hard labor. You know every inch of the land, every furrow, every seed planted. But the world beyond the fields calls, and you're ready to see what else life has in store for you.

features.name: Tough Skin
features.description_markdown: Your skin has become almost like a thick leather, and your used to hard laborious tasks. You gain **Vitality** equal to twice your **Tier** and increases as you level.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Your skin has become almost like a thick leather, and your used to hard laborious tasks. You gain **Vitality** equal to twice your **Tier** and increases as you level.

vocations.name: Brewer
vocations.flavor: Distilling spirits was more than just a skill—it was an art passed down through generations. You've learned the secrets of fermentation, the delicate balance of flavors that can make a drink legendary. Now, you seek to craft your own legend beyond the brewery.

features.name: Cure Aliment
features.description_markdown: You've seen that look enough times to know how to fix it, just one swing of your brew and it's all good. As part of your **Daily Preparation**, you create a single brew that will end the following conditions, **Dazed**, **Poisoned**, or **Unconscious**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You've seen that look enough times to know how to fix it, just one swing of your brew and it's all good. As part of your **Daily Preparation**, you create a single brew that will end the following conditions, **Dazed**, **Poisoned**, or **Unconscious**.

origins.name: Guildmate
origins.flavor: You began your career within one of the powerful trade guilds, learning its secrets and building a network of contacts.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** None
**Kits:** Trade tools, Trade sample case
**Clothing:** Guild uniform/attire
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Guild membership badge, Official documents, Guild rulebook, Networking contact list, Contract templates, Official seal or stamp

misc.raw: Guild membership badge, Official documents, Guild rulebook, Networking contact list, Contract templates, Official seal or stamp

vocations.name: Accountant
vocations.flavor: Numbers have always made sense to you in a way people never did. Every ledger tells a story, every column of figures a hidden truth. Your mastery of mathematics might just be the key to unlocking opportunities far beyond simple bookkeeping.

features.name: Crunch The Numbers
features.description_markdown: When dealing with matters of money or expenses, you always add **ambition** without any cost.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive 
When dealing with matters of money or expenses, you always add **ambition** without any cost.

vocations.name: Courier
vocations.flavor: Speed is your greatest asset, and reliability your reputation. Through wind, rain, or treacherous roads, you've never failed to deliver. The guild taught you more than just how to carry messages—they taught you how to survive.

features.name: Mobile
features.description_markdown: Once per **respite**, you gain **disengage** or **dash** as a single **Free Action**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Once per **respite**, you gain **disengage** or **dash** as a single **Free Action**.

vocations.name: Hireling
vocations.flavor: The guild's rules were never quite enough to contain your ambition. You've learned the trade, made your connections, sold your skills to the highest bidder, and now you're ready to carve your own path. No more playing by someone else's book—it's time to write your own.

features.name: Opportunist
features.description_markdown: When a target within **melee** range would try to **disengage**, you may attempt a **grapple** or **trip** action.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** 1 AP
When a target within **melee** range would try to **disengage**, you may attempt a **grapple** or **trip** action.

origins.name: Magic Initiate
origins.flavor: You received formal training in the arcane arts, though circumstances prevented you from completing your studies.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Alchemical ingredients
**Kits:** None
**Clothing:** Academic robes
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Student's spellbook, Practice wand, Magical theory texts, Enchanted quill, Scroll of a tier 1 spell, Academy badge or token, Practice target dummy

misc.raw: Student's spellbook, Practice wand, Magical theory texts, Enchanted quill, Scroll of a tier 1 spell, Academy badge or token, Practice target dummy

origin_features.name: Spellcasting
origin_features.description_markdown: You gain access to **limited spell casting** using **mana** if you have no **spellcasting**. In addition you gain the two **Cantrips** from the **Magic Initiate**.
origin_features.raw_markdown: You gain access to **limited spell casting** using **mana** if you have no **spellcasting**. In addition you gain the two **Cantrips** from the **Magic Initiate**.

origin_features.name: Spellcasting
origin_features.description_markdown:
- You are a **limited-caster**
- Your **source** is **Mana**
- Your **spell casting modifier** is **Mind**
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).**
origin_features.raw_markdown:
- You are a **limited-caster**
- Your **source** is **Mana**
- Your **spell casting modifier** is **Mind**
- Your total **reservoir** equals _(½ × Tier) + Spellcasting Modifier_ (rounded up).
- Start with Two **Known Spells** at Tier 1
- Your **prepared spells** equal your **Spellcasting Modifier**.
- Your **Spell DC** = 10 + Spell Tier + Spellcasting Modifier.
- Each **Respite** restores spell points equal to your **Spellcasting Modifier** (minimum 3).**

###### Cantrips 

**Apprentice's Artifice**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
You perform a minor magical feats using your abilities such as:
- **Alteration** You can change the physical state of an object's color, cleanliness, and temperature. If color or temperature the effect only lasts for 10 minutes. 
- **Illumination** You can instantly adjust the state of an object which can be lit by fire, or create small bursts of dim-light
- **Sensory** Create small instant auditory, visual, or aroma effect, which is harmless in nature.

**Mana Dart**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
Make a **spell attack roll**, on hit deal 1d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, deal one extra dice per your current **tier**.

**Swift Scribe** 
**Range** Touch | **Duration** Instant
Using your magic you can copy visual text or symbols by etching and imprinting onto objects. These copies are non-magical in nature.

**System Shock**
**Range** Melee | **Duration** Instant
Make **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, the target is **dazed** until the end of their next turn.

spellcasting.known_spells: Start with Two Known Spells at Tier 1
spellcasting.respite_recovery: Each Respite restores spell points equal to your Spellcasting Modifier (minimum 3).
extra_bullets: Your spell casting modifier is Mind

granted_cantrips.name: Apprentice's Artifice
granted_cantrips.description_markdown:
You perform a minor magical feats using your abilities such as:
- **Alteration** You can change the physical state of an object's color, cleanliness, and temperature. If color or temperature the effect only lasts for 10 minutes.
- **Illumination** You can instantly adjust the state of an object which can be lit by fire, or create small bursts of dim-light
- **Sensory** Create small instant auditory, visual, or aroma effect, which is harmless in nature.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Apprentice's Artifice**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
You perform a minor magical feats using your abilities such as:
- **Alteration** You can change the physical state of an object's color, cleanliness, and temperature. If color or temperature the effect only lasts for 10 minutes.
- **Illumination** You can instantly adjust the state of an object which can be lit by fire, or create small bursts of dim-light
- **Sensory** Create small instant auditory, visual, or aroma effect, which is harmless in nature.

granted_cantrips.name: Mana Dart
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: Make a **spell attack roll**, on hit deal 1d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, deal one extra dice per your current **tier**.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Mana Dart**
**Range** Close | **Duration** Instant
Make a **spell attack roll**, on hit deal 1d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, deal one extra dice per your current **tier**.

granted_cantrips.name: Swift Scribe
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: Using your magic you can copy visual text or symbols by etching and imprinting onto objects. These copies are non-magical in nature.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**Swift Scribe**
**Range** Touch | **Duration** Instant
Using your magic you can copy visual text or symbols by etching and imprinting onto objects. These copies are non-magical in nature.

granted_cantrips.name: System Shock
granted_cantrips.description_markdown: Make **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, the target is **dazed** until the end of their next turn.
granted_cantrips.raw_markdown:
**System Shock**
**Range** Melee | **Duration** Instant
Make **spell attack roll**, on a hit deal 2d4 **arcane** damage. On a **critical hit**, the target is **dazed** until the end of their next turn.

vocations.name: Academic
vocations.flavor: The guild's rules were never quite enough to contain your ambition. You've learned the trade, made your connections, and now you're ready to carve your own path. No more playing by someone else's book—it's time to write your own.

features.name: Arcane Recall
features.description_markdown: Once per **Long Rest**, you **Cast a spell** of **Tier 1** without expending **Reservoir**. You gain 2 **known spells** from your **Source**, they do not count against your known spells.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** 2 AP
Once per **Long Rest**, you **Cast a spell** of **Tier 1** without expending **Reservoir**. You gain 2 **known spells** from your **Source**, they do not count against your known spells.

vocations.name: Self-taught
vocations.flavor: No master could contain your curiosity, no traditional path could guide your unique approach. You've pieced together magical knowledge through stolen scrolls, whispered secrets, and relentless practice. The world is your classroom, and magic bends to your will.

features.name: Best Way to Learn
features.description_markdown: You pride yourself with being better prepared than any other **Spellcaster**. You known an additional two **Tier 1** spells of any **Source**, they do not count against your known spells.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You pride yourself with being better prepared than any other **Spellcaster**. You known an additional two **Tier 1** spells of any **Source**, they do not count against your known spells.

vocations.name: Forbidden
vocations.flavor: The darkest tomes, the most dangerous rituals—these are the paths you've chosen. Others warn you of the risks, but they don't understand the call of forbidden knowledge. Something within you knows there are secrets worth any price.

features.name: Dark Boon
features.description_markdown:
The darkness that resides in you gives you power, but it will be obvious when used. Once per **respite**, you may use the **Dark Boon** in one of the following ways.
- Gain resistance to the next damage you take for 1 minute
- Add your **Will** to an attack or damage roll
- Add your **Ambition** to any roll with no penalty of failure
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** 1 AP
The darkness that resides in you gives you power, but it will be obvious when used. Once per **respite**, you may use the **Dark Boon** in one of the following ways.
- Gain resistance to the next damage you take for 1 minute
- Add your **Will** to an attack or damage roll
- Add your **Ambition** to any roll with no penalty of failure

origins.name: Nobility
origins.flavor: Whether through birth or adoption, you were raised among the nobility and educated in the ways of privilege and power.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** None
**Kits:** Personal grooming kit
**Clothing:** Fine clothing (3 sets)
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Signet ring, Family crest, Letters of introduction, Servant's whistle, Small lockbox, Family tree document, Small purse of silver coins

misc.raw: Signet ring, Family crest, Letters of introduction, Servant's whistle, Small lockbox, Family tree document, Small purse of silver coins

vocations.name: Educated
vocations.flavor: Knowledge was your birthright, libraries your playground. You've been groomed since childhood to understand the subtle arts of governance, diplomacy, and refined learning. The world is a chessboard, and you've been trained to play several moves ahead.

features.name: Cultural Interests
features.description_markdown: You gain an two additional languages, one to speak and one to read, relevant to your world. In addition, you have **Resolve** when making **Skill Checks** related to **Social** or **Lore**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You gain an two additional languages, one to speak and one to read, relevant to your world. In addition, you have **Resolve** when making **Skill Checks** related to **Social** or **Lore**.

vocations.name: Socialite
vocations.flavor: Charm is your weapon, connections your armor. You've navigated the treacherous waters of high society with a smile and a carefully placed word. What others see as mere parties, you see as battlegrounds of influence and opportunity.

features.name: Demoralize
features.description_markdown:
You've heard enough stories of bastards and mistress to know one when you see one. Make a **Will** check against the targets **Will**.
- On a **success**, you may choose to either have them be **Dazed** or **Compelled**.
- On a **critical success**, you may choose to either have them be **Enraged** or **Frightened**

This effect lasts for 1d4 rounds.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Support | **Cost** 2 AP
You've heard enough stories of bastards and mistress to know one when you see one. Make a **Will** check against the targets **Will**.
- On a **success**, you may choose to either have them be **Dazed** or **Compelled**.
- On a **critical success**, you may choose to either have them be **Enraged** or **Frightened**

This effect lasts for 1d4 rounds.

vocations.name: Warfare
vocations.flavor: War runs in your blood, as does your desire for glory. You've studied strategy, trained with the finest weapons, and understand that true power sometimes comes from the point of a sword. The battlefield is where legends are born.

features.name: "Not on my watch!"
features.description_markdown: If your allies are meant to die, it will not be when they are in your presence. Once per **long rest** when an attack will land on an ally, grant them an **Armor** bonus equal to your **Tier** for that attack.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Range** Engagement
If your allies are meant to die, it will not be when they are in your presence. Once per **long rest** when an attack will land on an ally, grant them an **Armor** bonus equal to your **Tier** for that attack.

origins.name: Nomad
origins.flavor: Your early years were spent traveling with your people or alone between settlements, learning to live off the land and navigate by the stars.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Preserved uncommon foods, Trading goods from different regions
**Kits:** Survival kit
**Clothing:** None
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Weather-resistant tent, Map (partially filled), Star navigation tools, Cultural tokens from various regions, Multi-purpose walking staff, Water purification stones

consumables.raw: Preserved uncommon foods, Trading goods from different regions

misc.raw: Weather-resistant tent, Map (partially filled), Star navigation tools, Cultural tokens from various regions, Multi-purpose walking staff, Water purification stones

vocations.name: Herbalist
vocations.flavor: You grasp nature in a way that most never will. You understand the secrets, the healing powers, the hidden strengths. What others see as simple wilderness, you see as a living breathing friend who has given you their bounty.

features.name: Nature's Cure
features.description_markdown: You know how to quickly make a healing salve to prepare you for the day ahead. As part of your **Daily Preperation**, create a **minor healing potion** or **antidote**. Requires area to have **living fauna**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You know how to quickly make a healing salve to prepare you for the day ahead. As part of your **Daily Preperation**, create a **minor healing potion** or **antidote**. Requires area to have **living fauna**.

vocations.name: Hunter
vocations.flavor: The wilderness is your home, prey your conversation. Every track tells a story, every movement a potential meal. You've learned to become one with the hunt, to survive where others would perish.

features.name: Hunter's Mark
features.description_markdown: Once per **respite**, you mark the target with your chosen marking tool, guiding your weapons to their heart. While the target is **Marked**, you can add 1d4 to damage and attack rolls. If the target escapes, you have **Resolve** to track them for two hours.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Duration** 1 Minute
Once per **respite**, you mark the target with your chosen marking tool, guiding your weapons to their heart. While the target is **Marked**, you can add 1d4 to damage and attack rolls. If the target escapes, you have **Resolve** to track them for two hours.

vocations.name: Pathfinder
vocations.flavor: Stars, wind, terrain—these are the maps others cannot read. You've traversed landscapes that would break most people, finding paths where others see only obstacles. The journey is your true destination.

features.name: Trappers Eyes
features.description_markdown: When looking for traps, hazards, or other similar effects, you add your **ambition** without cost.
features.raw_markdown:
**Activation** Passive
When looking for traps, hazards, or other similar effects, you add your **ambition** without cost.

origins.name: Outlaw
origins.flavor: Whether by choice or necessity, you lived outside the law, learning to survive by wit and guile.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** None
**Kits:** Disguise kit or Forgery tools, Lockpicks
**Clothing:** Dark hooded cloak
**Misc. (Pick 2):** False identities (3), Warning signals handbook, Stolen item fence contacts, Suspicious maps with marked locations, Emergency escape tools

kits.raw: Disguise kit or Forgery tools, Lockpicks

misc.raw: False identities (3), Warning signals handbook, Stolen item fence contacts, Suspicious maps with marked locations, Emergency escape tools

vocations.name: Brute
vocations.flavor: Strength is your answer to most problems. Subtlety was never your style—why whisper when you can make a statement with your fists? The world respects power, and you've got more than enough to spare.

features.name: Push Them Around
features.description_markdown: You got use to pushing people around enough that it comes with ease now. After you make a successful melee attack, you may immediately use **Shove** at no cost. On a **critical hit**, you gain **Resolve** on your next attack roll.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger
You got use to pushing people around enough that it comes with ease now. After you make a successful melee attack, you may immediately use **Shove** at no cost. On a **critical hit**, you gain **Resolve** on your next attack roll.

vocations.name: Hotshot
vocations.flavor: Every interaction is a game, every conversation a potential score. You've learned to read people, to find the angle, to turn nothing into something. Survival is an art, and you're a master con artist.

features.name: Red-handed
features.description_markdown: Once per **Long Rest**, when you or an ally would fail a skill check related to **Deception** or **Persuasion**, you may force them to make an opposing **Mind** or **Will** check against your **defenses**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
Once per **Long Rest**, when you or an ally would fail a skill check related to **Deception** or **Persuasion**, you may force them to make an opposing **Mind** or **Will** check against your **defenses**.

vocations.name: Thief
vocations.flavor: Locks are puzzles, security a challenge. You don't just steal—you perform. Each heist is a work of art, each stolen item a testament to your skill. The world is full of treasures, and you know exactly how to claim them.

features.name: Slick Hands
features.description_markdown: On your first attempt when making checks related to **Thievery** you add your **Ambition** without a cost.
features.raw_markdown:
**Activation** Passive 
On your first attempt when making checks related to **Thievery** you add your **Ambition** without a cost.

origins.name: Soldier
origins.flavor: You served in a military force, learning discipline and the arts of war before choosing a different path.

origin_pack.raw:
**Consumables:** Field rations (1 week), Tobacco or herb pipe
**Kits:** Injury treatment supplies
**Clothing:** Uniform (modified for civilian use)
**Misc. (Pick 2):** Medal or insignia, Military manual, War stories journal, Regulation mess kit, Former unit banner piece

consumables.raw: Field rations (1 week), Tobacco or herb pipe

misc.raw: Medal or insignia, Military manual, War stories journal, Regulation mess kit, Former unit banner piece

vocations.name: Medic
vocations.flavor: Healing is its own form of warfare. You've seen the worst of conflict, learned to patch up bodies and souls under the most extreme conditions. Your skills are a lifeline in a world of chaos. You've seen to many friends die due to the pants of a lord, now it's time to go help those who truly need help.

features.name: Battle Medic
features.description_markdown: You attempt to repair the **body** of a target and keep it from bleeding out any further. Make an **intellect** roll against the targets **body** to heal **Vitality** equal to your **intellect**. On **critical success**, you add 2d4. This can only be used once **long rest** per target.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Offensive | **Cost** 3 AP | **Range** Touch
You attempt to repair the **body** of a target and keep it from bleeding out any further. Make an **intellect** roll against the targets **body** to heal **Vitality** equal to your **intellect**. On **critical success**, you add 2d4. This can only be used once **long rest** per target.

vocations.name: Infantry
vocations.flavor: The front lines were your classroom, survival your most important lesson. You've marched through hell, stood when others fell, and learned that true strength is about more than just muscle. Though now that your lord's war is over, maybe it's time to find a less hellish venture.

features.name: Charger
features.description_markdown: You charge into an enemy you were not **engaged** with and make an **attack** roll. Your attack roll has a +2 to hit. After your attack, regardless of hit or miss you and the target become **Engaged**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Offensive | **Cost** 2 AP | **Range** Close
You charge into an enemy you were not **engaged** with and make an **attack** roll. Your attack roll has a +2 to hit. After your attack, regardless of hit or miss you and the target become **Engaged**.

vocations.name: Thane
vocations.flavor: War is fought with more than just swords. You've learned the battlefield of politics, the strategy of diplomacy. Words can be sharper than any blade, and you've mastered their use. Though your skills were never appreciated, let's see if they do once they are bowing before you.

features.name: Do Not Falter
features.description_markdown: When an ally nearby would have their **Ambition** reduced to 0, you inspire them to keep moving forward. They regain **Ambition** equal to your **ambition** dice. A target may only benefit from this once per **rest**.
features.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Range** Close
When an ally nearby would have their **Ambition** reduced to 0, you inspire them to keep moving forward. They regain **Ambition** equal to your **ambition** dice. A target may only benefit from this once per **rest**.
